Metadata.SourceFile: How to be a Complete Bastard.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "HOWTOBEACOMPLETEBASTARD-0400" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$76 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "How to be a Complete Bastard.prg"
